creator: seanc@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a duplicate PR of PR 28400, my bad.  <:~)

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=28400

	The CDB_File.pm module owner has been contacted regarding 
version 0.86 not being available through CPAN and there is still no 
response.  Could we use an alternate MASTER until the author is able to 
get 0.86 put into CPAN correctly?  I'm willing to host...  -sc

-- 
Sean Chittenden
